overviewSubtitle: View device assets, availability, alerts, logs, and authentication audit status in one place
snmpMonitoringDesc: Collect availability, interface traffic, CPU, memory, and key OID metrics
syslogCenterDesc: Ingest device logs with search, retention, alert linkage, and audit tracing
radiusAuditDesc: Aggregate authentication, authorization, and accounting data to trace network access
alertsDesc: Trigger notifications and response workflows from metrics, logs, and authentication events
